196.reason: [When cur_index is 0, tokenList[cur_index - 1] accesses invalid memory; also, the method returns a new Token but doesn't advance cur_index, causing potential infinite loops in parser]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [When cur_index is 0, tokenList[cur_index - 1] accesses invalid memory; also, the method returns a new Token but doesn't advance cur_index, causing potential infinite loops in parser]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: accessing tokenList[cur_index - 1] when cur_index might be 0 leads to out-of-bounds access.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [This creates a synthetic token but doesn't advance cur_index, causing potential infinite loops or repeated error reporting since the parser never consumes the missing token]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: accessing tokenList[cur_index - 1] when cur_index might be 0 or out of bounds leads to crash or incorrect line number.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [This creates a fake token but doesn't advance cur_index, causing the parser to remain at the same position and potentially leading to infinite loops or repeated error reporting]

194.reason: [When cur_index is 0, tokenList[cur_index - 1] accesses an invalid index (-1), causing undefined behavior. The error line number should be based on the current expected position or the last valid token in context, but accessing cur_index - 1 without checking if cur_index > 0 is unsafe.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [When cur_index is 0, tokenList[cur_index - 1] accesses an invalid index (-1), causing undefined behavior. The error line number should be based on the current expected position or the last valid token in context, but accessing cur_index - 1 without checking if cur_index > 0 is unsafe.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [When cur_index is 0, tokenList[cur_index - 1] accesses an invalid negative index, causing undefined behavior. Also, for missing symbols at EOF, the error line should be the last valid token's line, but this logic fails when tokenList is empty or cur_index is beyond bounds.]
